zh.lifeSummary: 當Reverend William Squire Sr.於1520年4月18日出生在英國薩默塞特查爾頓時，他的父親John Squire41歲，母親Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon36歲。他於1550年10月25日與Alice Skarlett在英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾被列為rector of charlton mackrell。他去世於1567年9月15日在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特諾頓 素布 哈姆頓聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reverend William Squire Sr.于1520年4月18日出生在英国薩默塞特查爾頓时，他的父亲John Squire41岁，母亲Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon36岁。他于1550年10月25日与Alice Skarlett在英国英格兰薩默塞特查爾頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在英国薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾被列为rector of charlton mackrell。他去世于1567年9月15日在英国薩默塞特查爾頓 麥可雷爾享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特諾頓 素布 哈姆頓聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Squire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name, occupational name, or a nickname from Middle English squyer, squer, skier, sker, northern Middle English swire (Old French escuyer, escuier) ‘shield bearer, esquire, personal attendant to a knight; landowner below the rank of knight; young man of gentle birth; household attendant, retainer, page, messenger’. Many early bearers of this name were of modest means and cannot have been members of the gentry; in such cases the name may have been used hyperbolically for a low-ranking servant or as a nickname. By the 17th century, the term denoted any member of the landed gentry, but this is unlikely to have influenced the development of the surname.

variants.name: Swire
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Squire  , from a northern form of the word.

variants.name: Quire
meanings: Scottish or Irish: shortened form of   McQuire   (see   McGuire  ).

variants.name: Squires
meanings: English: variant of Squire , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Scuderi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmelo, Salvatore, Angelo, Carlo, Gaetano, Vito, Antonio, Dante, Mario, Rocco, Rosario, Antonino, Biaggio, Eduardo, Ermelinda, Margarita.

Italian (Sicily): status name equivalent to Squire , from scudiero, scutiero, dialect scuteri ‘shieldbearer’ (from medieval Latin scutarius, an agent derivative of scutum ‘shield’). In Byzantium, the Greek word skoutarios denoted a member of the imperial guard.

variants.name: Square
meanings: English (Devon) and Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Squire  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Reverend William Squire Sr. was born on 18 April 1520, in Charlton, Somerset, England, his father, John Squire, was 41 and his mother, Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon, was 36. He married Alice Skarlett on 25 October 1550, in Charlton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as rector of charlton mackrell in Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England. He died on 15 September 1567, in Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in St Mary The Virgin's Church, Norton sub Hamdon, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Church of St. Mary the Virgin, Norton su: St Mary The Virgin's Church, Norton sub Hamdon, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reverend William Squire Sr. est né le 18 avril 1520, à Charlton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Squire, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Alice Skarlett le 25 octobre 1550, à Charlton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est rector of charlton mackrell à Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 15 septembre 1567, à Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary The Virgin's Church, Norton sub Hamdon, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reverend William Squire Sr. am 18. April 1520 in Charlton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Squire 41 und seine Mutter Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon 36. Er hat am 25. Oktober 1550 in Charlton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Alice Skarlett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als rector of charlton mackrell in Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. September 1567 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England und wurde in St Mary The Virgin's Church, Norton sub Hamdon, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend William Squire Sr. è nato il il 18 aprile 1520 nel Charlton, Somerset, England, il suo padre, John Squire, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Alice Skarlett il 25 ottobre 1550, nel Charlton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come rector of charlton mackrell nel Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England. Morì il 15 settembre 1567, nel Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary The Virgin's Church, Norton sub Hamdon, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Reverend William Squire Sr.が1520年4月18日にイギリスソメルセトチャールトンで生まれた時，父John Squireは41歳，母Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbonは36歳であった。1550年10月25日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャールトンでAlice Skarlettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリスソメルセトチャールトン マクレルでの職業はrector of charlton mackrellと記録されている。彼は1567年9月15日にイギリスソメルセトチャールトン マクレルで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトノートン スブ ハムドンスト マリー ス バージン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Church of St. Mary the Virgin, Norton su: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 노르턴 수브 함던 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Reverend William Squire Sr.(이)가 1520년 4월 18일 영국 서머세트 찰턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Squire(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1550년 10월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰턴에서 Alice Skarlett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 서머세트 찰턴 맥크렐에서 rector of charlton mackrell이었다. 그는 1567년 9월 15일 영국 서머세트 찰턴 맥크렐에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 노르턴 수브 함던 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.18 April 1520–15 September 1567: 18 de abril de 1520–15 de setembro de 1567
pt.Church of St. Mary the Virgin, Norton su: St Mary The Virgin's Church, Norton sub Hamdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.CharltonMackrell, Somerset, England: Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, England, Un: Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend William Squire Sr. nasceu em 18 de abril de 1520, em Charlton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Squire, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Skarlett em 25 de outubro de 1550, em Charlton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como rector of charlton mackrell em Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1567, em Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary The Virgin's Church, Norton sub Hamdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Church of St. Mary the Virgin, Norton su: ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, нортон суб хамдон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reverend William Squire Sr. родился 18 апреля 1520 г. в местности чарлтон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Squire было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Skarlett 25 октября 1550 г. в местности чарлтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии rector of charlton mackrell в местности чарлтон маккрелл, сомирсет, Англия. Он умер 15 сентября 1567 г. в местности чарлтон маккрелл, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, нортон суб хамдон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.18 April 1520–15 September 1567: 18 de abril de 1520–15 de septiembre de 1567

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reverend William Squire Sr. nació el 18 de abril de 1520, en Charlton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Squire, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Marguerite Capet de Bourbon, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Alice Skarlett el 25 de octubre de 1550, en Charlton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era rector of charlton mackrell en Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inglaterra. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1567, en Charlton Mackrell, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en St Mary The Virgin's Church, Norton sub Hamdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
